speaker: speaker1
text: May I know where you are going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I want to go to Beijing Hotel .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry . You are going in the wrong direction .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh no ! What shall I do ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't worry . You can get off at the next stop and go across the street through the overpass . The bus stop is right there .
